derived.causal_summary: Third phase of 114 packet. Runs the bespoke deep-loop: council-seeded hill-climbing across prompt variants, real SWE 1.6 dispatches per fixture (parallel wave of 3), deterministic + grader scoring via 002 rig, 3-signal weighted-vote convergence (plateau 0.40 + mutation-exhaustion 0.35 + MAD 0.25), legal-stop bundle (coverage + quality + budget). Min 6 iterations. 7-mode failure-recovery (429, grader dispute, parse error, cache race, fixture missing, grader cache poisoning, auth expiration) with pause-sentinel for free-tier rate limits. Outputs synthesis.md ranking variants with confidence scores for 004 to apply. Depends on 001 ratified + 002 dry-run green.
